name: risecorestudio
description: RiseCoreStudio (RCS) — internal agency Dev Hub & CMS monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w packages/rcs-cli && npm run build -w apps/web
